rationale: The antecedent H of the ensures implication isn't a hypothesis at the assert site, so unconditionally asserting H's conjuncts fails (as in attempt_01). Branching on H exposes the conjuncts as facts inside the branch, where transitivity through the common `pre_self_.seq@.update(i as int, out)` gives `post1_self_.seq@ == post2_self_.seq@`, and Ghost extensionality lifts to `post1_self_.seq == post2_self_.seq`; `seq_update_lemma` arms the update-trigger so z3 can line up the two ensures.
